observation.summary: Store distribution architecture docs were reader-authored while package channels and surfaces already live in executable store contract shards.

hypothesis.summary: A store distribution docs manifest plus contract shard reader can generate architecture and daemon-change docs while detecting doc drift.

execution.summary: Run storedistributiondocs to check generated docs and publish compact evidence in public CI.

evaluation.summary: The verifier rejects generated doc drift and the architecture coverage tool no longer classifies store-distribution as manual debt.

retrospective.summary: Store distribution architecture knowledge becomes contract-backed generated evidence instead of manually edited architecture prose.

evidence.proves: store distribution architecture docs are generated from the docs manifest and store contract shards
public CI uploads store distribution docs evidence
